images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese female model with a top-tier gravure idol aesthetic, standing on a sandy beach shoreline under a dark, moody sky. She is wearing a trendy, form-fitting varsity jacket unzipped to reveal a glimpse of her ample chest and slim waist, the fabric texture contrasting with the soft sand. She wears over-ear headphones around her neck, her straight black silky hair blowing in the coastal breeze. Captured in a POV dating style, she is biting her lip slightly, looking directly into the lens with a seductive yet cute gaze. The lighting is a harsh flash photography style, creating a bright, clear, professional look with overexposed high key color grades that wash out the shadows while emphasizing her flawless skin texture, visible pores, and faint vellus hair. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts, deep cleavage, ample cleavage, sexy photo, beautilful girl without makeup
